[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101 3
1 1101001 4
2 0001000 1
3 1011010 4
4 0110001 3
5 0100101 3
6 1101001 4
7 1100001 3

01 10 1101100 4
12 21 1100111 5
23 32 1000111 4
34 43 1001100 3
45 54 0001000 1 match 2
56 65 0111110 5
67 76 0001100 2
70 07 0111010 4

02 20 0001011 3
13 31 0100000 1
24 42 0001011 3
35 53 1000100 2
46 64 0110110 4
57 75 0110010 3
60 06 0110110 4
71 17 1010110 4

03 30 1001100 3
14 41 1101100 4
25 52 0000011 2
36 63 1111010 5
47 74 0111010 4
50 05 0001000 1 match 2
61 16 1011010 4 match 3
72 27 0110001 3 match 4

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 1100100 3
26 62 0111101 5
37 73 1110110 5
